title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Westside Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Westside Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Westside Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Westside Capital India:
Westside Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Westside Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
